scripts.docs:api: typedoc --options apps/docs/typedoc.core.json && typedoc --options apps/docs/typedoc.core-saves.json && typedoc --options apps/docs/typedoc.core-audio.json && typedoc --options apps/docs/typedoc.core-i18n.json && typedoc --options apps/docs/typedoc.ui.json && typedoc --options apps/docs/typedoc.ui-i18n.json && typedoc --options apps/docs/typedoc.mdx.json && typedoc --options apps/docs/typedoc.mdx-plugin.json
scripts.lint:root: biome check --error-on-warnings biome.json package.json turbo.json context7.json skills-lock.json happydom.ts scripts
scripts.format: biome check --write biome.json package.json turbo.json context7.json skills-lock.json happydom.ts scripts apps packages
scripts.format:check: biome format biome.json package.json turbo.json context7.json skills-lock.json happydom.ts scripts apps packages
